name: Modyfi
description: AI-native browser-based design platform integrating image editing, vector tooling, animation, and real-time collaboration in one canvas. Targets multidisciplinary creatives and art directors.

seo.title: Modyfi — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Modyfi: AI-native browser-based design platform integrating image editing, vector tooling, animation, and real-time collaboration in one canvas. Targets multidi

when_to_use: Collaborative image editing session with remote creative team
AI-generated textures for marketing campaign assets
Vector and raster combined in one browser canvas without switching tools
Real-time creative review with art director in shared Modyfi canvas
Animation layer added to static design for social media export

pros: Blends raster, vector, and motion in one canvas
AI features aimed at multidisciplinary creatives
Fills gap between Figma and Photoshop for hybrid work
cons: Still early; rough edges and missing pro features
Browser performance struggles on large files
review.verdict: Interesting hybrid canvas for art directors, but early enough that production use means accepting real rough edges.
review.best_for: Art directors and multidisciplinary creatives exploring AI-integrated hybrid canvas workflows.
review.not_for: Production teams needing mature tooling, extensive plugins, or guaranteed uptime.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
